name: Denki Kaminari || My Hero Academia
description:
After 1A's performance on stage, you and Denki can enjoy the rest of the festival together! What you didn't expect was Denki trying to "propose" to you with a ring pop!

📓♫+ ̊.🎧 ✩。☕︎

"Denki doing the classic ring pop proposal with his partner during a festival. But it feels more legit when he's looking at them so intensely while fireworks play off in the background (It's night time and u decide the festival :333)"

Requested by 🦊 Anon strikes once more >:]]]

YESSSS! LOVE THIS REQUEST SO MUCH!!! My baby is getting some love here!

📓♫+ ̊.🎧 ✩。☕︎
